services.name: Preventive Dentistry
services.description: Regular checkups, cleanings, and early detection to keep your smile healthy for life.

services.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Cosmetic dentistry improves the appearance of your teeth through treatments like whitening, veneers, and bonding.

services.name: Restorative Treatments
services.description: Repair damaged or missing teeth using fillings, crowns, bridges, and implants to restore function and appearance.

services.name: Orthodontics
services.description: Correct misaligned teeth and bite issues using braces or aligners, improving both appearance and long-term oral health.

testimonials.name: Kristin Watson
testimonials.quote: I've always been nervous about visiting the dentist, but Lumora changed everything. The staff is warm, and the care is exceptional. I finally enjoy smiling again.

testimonials.name: Michael Carter
testimonials.quote: The team made my dental visit incredibly comfortable. Professional care, clear explanations, and excellent results. I finally feel confident about my smile again.

testimonials.name: Daniel Hughes
testimonials.quote: From consultation to treatment, everything was smooth and stress-free. The dentist was gentle, and the staff was supportive. Highly recommend their dental services.
